thread.title: Keir Starmer (@Keir_Starmer): "I'm determined to deliver growth, create wealth and put more money in people’s pockets. This can only be achieved by working in partnership with leading businesses, like @BlackRock, to capitalise on the UK’s position as a world leading hub for investment." | nitter.poast.org

archived 23 Nov 2024 01:07:34 UTC wiki code {{cite web | title = Keir Starmer (@Keir_Starmer): "I'm determined to deliver growth, crea… | url = https://nitter.poast.org/Keir_Starmer/status/1859682871876911310 | date = 2024-11-23 | archiveurl = http://archive.today/uOVJJ | archivedate = 2024-11-23 }} nitter.poast.org Keir Starmer @Keir_Starmer Nov 21 I'm determined to deliver growth, create wealth and put more money in people’s pockets. This can only be achieved by working in partnership with leading businesses, like @BlackRock , to capitalise on the UK’s position as a world leading hub for investment. Nov 21, 2024 · 7:38 PM UTC 19,083 1,569 ❞ 6,273 ♥ 5,217 Rupert Lowe MP @RupertLowe10 Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP You’re an embarrassment, Prime Minister. 503 2,054 ❞ 63 ♥ 37,902 ... more replies Carl Benjamin @Sargon_of_Akkad Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP He's actually proud to be selling us out to Blackrock. Unreal. 268 1,506 ❞ 15 ♥ 32,786 leilani dowding 🌸🚜 ☮️ @LeilaniDowding Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP You sick fuck…. You WEF a puppet! We knew you had pay masters. You don’t serve the British people you serve Blackrock, the investment companies and the globalists 243 1,413 ❞ 21 ♥ 24,063 EuropeanPowell @EuropeanPowell Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP Blackrock is one of the most powerful and utterly corrupt shadow banking outfits in the world. BlackRock has been criticized for investing in companies that are involved in fossil fuels, the arms industry, the People's Liberation Army and human rights violations in China. Environmental, social and corporate governance investing (ESG) is cited as ‘a dangerous placebo that harms the public interest’. As of December 2018, BlackRock was the world's largest investor in coal-fired power stations, holding shares worth $11 billion in 56 companies in the industry. BlackRock owned more oil, gas, and thermal coal reserves than any other investment management company with total reserves amounting to 9.5 gigatonnes of CO2 emissions or 30% of total energy-related emissions from 2017. That Starmer is in bed with this malign planet destroying Trump loving company that pretty much owns everything is cause for extremely urgent investigation. The MSM must give the public the facts about Blackrock, the UK’s future is with the EU not US planet destroyers like Blackrock. 83 1,063 ❞ 37 ♥ 4,596 UK Column @ukcolumn Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP When the World Economic Forum signed its Strategic Partnership with the United Nations, it claimed that the purpose was "to accelerate the implementation of the 2030 Agenda for Sustainable Development". In his 2021 letter to shareholders, the CEO of BlackRock, Larry Fink, referred to acceleration seven times. Read here: ukcolumn.org/article/acceler… 21 377 ❞ 16 ♥ 1,461 Adam Brooks AKA EssexPR 🇬🇧 @EssexPR Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP Almost a million views, yet you got 1.5k likes, that should indicate what those who know what Blackrock do, are thinking. 51 253 ❞ ♥ 6,302 Philip Proudfoot 🇱🇧🇵🇸 @PhilipProudfoot Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP You’re going to The Hague too, Starmer. 10 75 ❞ 1 ♥ 1,123 Ashton Ward @AshtonWard01 Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP Bill Gates and BlackRock are your masters… Robert F. Kennedy Jr @RobertKennedyJr Jan 7 Few people understand what the war in Ukraine means for big business. It’s not just the weapons and reconstruction contracts. Ukraine’s vast agricultural lands—among the most fertile in the world—are up for grabs, and American companies like BlackRock are at front of the line. 49 680 ❞ 15 ♥ 6,523 leilani dowding 🌸🚜 ☮️ @LeilaniDowding Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP I wonder when people will “get it”. dreddymd.com/2022/05/03/blac… 105 1,061 ❞ 44 ♥ 5,273 Aaron Bastani @AaronBastani Nov 21 Replying to @Keir_Starmer @BlackRock @RachelReevesMP How asset managers plan to privatise everything, and make the rest of us poorer: invidious.poast.org/0jxL9Cktsao?si=Hops… The Plan Is To Privatise EVERYTHING. Here’s How | Aaron Bastani meets...
